name: Overstock
effect: +1 card slot in the shop

name: Overstock Plus
effect: +1 more card slot in the shop

name: Clearance Sale
effect: All cards and packs in shop are 25% off

name: Liquidation
effect: All cards and packs in shop are 50% off

name: Hone
effect: Foil, Holographic and Polychrome cards appear 2x more often

name: Glow Up
effect: Foil, Holographic and Polychrome cards appear 4x more often

name: Reroll Surplus
effect: Rerolls cost $2 less

name: Reroll Glut
effect: Rerolls cost an additional $2 less

name: Crystal Ball
effect: +1 consumable slot

name: Omen Globe
effect: Spectral cards may appear in any Arcana Pack

name: Telescope
effect: Celestial Packs always contain the Planet card for your most played poker hand

name: Observatory
effect: Planet cards in your consumable area give x1.5 Mult for their poker hand

name: Grabber
effect: Permanently gain +1 hand per round

name: Nacho Tong
effect: Permanently gain another +1 hand per round

name: Wasteful
effect: Permanently gain +1 discard per round

name: Recyclomancy
effect: Permanently gain another +1 discard per round

name: Tarot Merchant
effect: Tarot cards appear 2x more frequently in the shop

name: Tarot Tycoon
effect: Tarot cards appear 4x more frequently in the shop

name: Planet Merchant
effect: Planet cards appear 2x more frequently in the shop

name: Planet Tycoon
effect: Planet cards appear 4x more frequently in the shop

name: Seed Money
effect: Raise the cap on interest earned per round to $10

name: Money Tree
effect: Raise the cap on interest earned per round to $20

name: Blank
effect: Does nothing?

name: Antimatter
effect: +1 Joker slot

name: Magic Trick
effect: Playing cards can be purchased from the shop

name: Illusion
effect: Playing cards in shop may have an enhancement, edition, or seal

name: Hieroglyph
effect: -1 Ante, -1 hand per round

name: Petroglyph
effect: -1 Ante, -1 discard per round

name: Director's Cut
effect: Reroll Boss Blind once per Ante, $10 per roll

name: Retcon

name: Paint Brush

name: Palette
